title: selaginella macraei
intro: Selaginella macraei, also known as Macraei's spike moss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, specifically a type of evergreen, perennial, and rhizomatous spikemoss. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, where its leaves and stems are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella macraei include its potential to aid in the reduction of inflammation, improve circulation, and support immune function. Selaginella macraei is commonly prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
